name: Cook
ability: Reduces daily grub consumption by 1 per level rank (min 1 consumed)

name: Quartermaster
ability: Recovers spent grub and grog equal to level rank per day

name: Captain
ability: Grants morale boost — crew perform better under pressure. Effect scales with level.

name: Helmsperson
ability: Provides extra movement. Each level rank adds +5 ft to ship speed during maneuvers.

name: Boatswain
ability: Extinguishes fires — can automatically put out fires equal to level rank per encounter.

name: Master Gunner
ability: Reroll 1 die per level rank on cannon attacks per round.

name: Shipwright
ability: Repairs 1 HP per level rank per day while at sea.

name: Navigator
ability: Performs navigation checks. Higher levels reduce chance of getting lost and improve travel time.
